fov-simulator.name: Simulator ng Field-of-View
fov-simulator.description: Ikumpara ang field of view sa iba't ibang focal length at sensor size

color-scheme-generator.name: Tagabuo ng Color Scheme
color-scheme-generator.description: Gumawa ng color palette para sa iyong photo shoot

exposure-simulator.name: Simulator ng Exposure Triangle
exposure-simulator.description: Tingnan kung paano magkakaugnay ang aperture, shutter speed, at ISO

dof-simulator.name: Simulator ng Depth-of-Field
dof-simulator.description: I-visualize kung paano apektado ng aperture, focal length, at distance ang background blur

focus-stacking-calculator.name: Kalkulador ng Focus Stacking
focus-stacking-calculator.description: Kalkulahin ang tamang focus distances para sa front-to-back sharpness

equivalent-settings-calculator.name: Kalkulador ng Katumbas na Settings
equivalent-settings-calculator.description: Hanapin ang equivalent aperture at focal length sa iba't ibang sensor format

hyperfocal-simulator.name: Simulator ng Hyperfocal na Distansya
hyperfocal-simulator.description: Alamin kung saan mag-focus para sa maximum sharpness mula foreground hanggang infinity

shutter-speed-visualizer.name: Visualizer ng Shutter Speed
shutter-speed-visualizer.description: Hanapin ang pinakamabagal na safe shutter speed para sa sharp na handheld shots

nd-filter-calculator.name: Kalkulador ng ND Filter
nd-filter-calculator.description: Kalkulahin ang exposure time gamit ang kahit anong ND filter

star-trail-calculator.name: Kalkulador ng Star Trail
star-trail-calculator.description: Kalkulahin ang max exposure para sa sharp na stars o magplano ng star trail shot

perspective-compression-simulator.name: Simulator ng Pagkasiksik ng Perspektibo
perspective-compression-simulator.description: Tingnan kung paano apektado ng focal length ang background compression

white-balance-visualizer.name: Visualizer ng White Balance
white-balance-visualizer.description: Tingnan kung paano apektado ng color temperature ang mga litrato mo

sensor-size-comparison.name: Paghahambing ng Sensor Size
sensor-size-comparison.description: Visually na ikumpara ang mga camera sensor size

frame-studio.name: Studio ng Frame
frame-studio.description: I-crop, i-frame, at i-compose ang mga litrato gamit ang grid overlays

exif-viewer.name: Tagabasa ng EXIF
exif-viewer.description: Tingnan ang EXIF metadata at histogram ng kahit anong litrato — 100% client-side

megapixel-visualizer.name: Megapixel Size Visualizer
megapixel-visualizer.description: Compare megapixels, visualize print sizes, and see file sizes across aspect ratios and DPIs
